$schema_comment: Claude Code hooks for the portable InsightHub harness. These checks support, but do not replace, ./init.sh.

hooks.command: ./init.sh > /tmp/insight_hub_harness_init.log 2>&1 && echo '[harness] init.sh OK' || (echo '[harness] init.sh failed; review /tmp/insight_hub_harness_init.log before closing' && tail -40 /tmp/insight_hub_harness_init.log)
hooks.description: Run the full harness verification before Claude stops.
